steps: Go to https://app.dub.co and sign up or log in
Select the workspace you want to create an API key for
Click 'Settings' in the left sidebar, then navigate to the 'API Keys' tab
Enter a name for the key and select the required permissions
Choose whether the key is associated with your user account or a machine user
Click 'Create API Key' and copy the key — it will not be shown again

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Dub.co workspace API key. Used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

notes: Free plan available with 1,000 links/month and basic analytics
API keys are workspace-scoped — each workspace has its own set of keys
Key is shown only once at creation — copy it immediately
API keys support granular permissions (links, analytics, domains, tags, etc.)
Use 'Bearer' prefix in the Authorization header: 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_KEY'

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve details about the current workspace
